Paragraph

In the context of functional analysis, there is a need to consider possible convergence of a sequence of linear functional on \(C[a, b]\text{,}\) given in the form of \(g\in C[a, b]\mapsto \int_{a}^{b} g(x)f_{k}(x)\, dx\text{,}\) where \(\{f_{k}\}\) is a sequence of continuous or Riemann integrable functions on \([a, b]\) with certain bounds, say, \(\int_{a}^{b} |f_{k}(x)|\, dx\le M\) for all \(k\text{.}\) If there is a limit, then it could be given in terms of the Riemann-Stieltjes integral with respect to some increasing function.
in-context
